title: No Miss
description: A client-side Fabric mod that prevents accidental attacks when no entity is in your crosshair.
body: No Miss is a simple quality-of-life mod for Minecraft that helps you avoid wasting attack cooldown by preventing hits when there's no target in your crosshair. Toggle the feature on or off with a single keybind (default: N key). Perfect for PvP and general gameplay where precision matters.
